creator: freebsd@neilalexander.dev
text:
My mistake, I assume if I switch to the GO_MODULE approach, I will lose the ability to pin the specific versions of golang.org/x/{net,sys,text} as you did?

If so, I will stick to the GH_TUPLE method for this patch and bring back your changes and I will make sure that the go.mod upstream is fixed for v0.5.0 so that I can switch to GO_MODULE then.

Changelog for the commit message is https://github.com/yggdrasil-network/yggdrasil-go/releases/tag/v0.4.7 if the URL is sufficient.
